name: medical office managers processing 10–20 appointments/month tool
description: For medical office managers processing 10–20 appointments/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of appointment and billing records.
problem_solved: Inaccurate billing due to mismatched appointment records.
